## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] App behaviour / core logic
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Reports / output
- [ ] Build / release
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Repo hygiene

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] I have checked the changed files for obvious mistakes, stale wording and contradictions.
- [ ] I have kept the scope of the PR clear and explained any larger bundled work.
- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally or in GitHub Actions.
- [ ] `npm run check:repo` passes locally or in GitHub Actions.
- [ ] `npm run preflight` passes locally or in GitHub Actions.
- [ ] If this affects Windows packaging, the Windows build workflow has been run or the reason for not running it is stated.
- [ ] If this affects audit output, a report has been generated or the reason for not generating one is stated.
- [ ] If this affects documentation, README / Windows guide / release docs have been kept in sync.

## Testing notes

Add screenshots, logs, workflow links or a short explanation of what was tested.

## Follow-up work

List anything intentionally left out of this PR.
